title: cynoglossum holosericeum
intro: Cynoglossum holosericeum, also known as Chinese forked tongue or forked tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cynoglossum holosericeum include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or in a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
